compiled_state.title: Implement validate-gate-signal.py validation helper
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/scripts/validate-gate-signal.py that reads gate signal JSON from stdin, validates against the contract schema (gate-signal-schema.md), prints validation result to stdout, exits 0 on valid input, exits non-zero on invalid input.

Validation checks:
- All required fields present: gate_id, triggered, signal_type, evidence, confidence
- Correct types: gate_id (string), triggered (boolean), signal_type (string in [primary, modifier]), evidence (string), confidence (string in [high, medium, low])
- Malformed JSON detection
- Empty object detection

Uses Python stdlib only (json, sys). No external dependencies.

TDD: GREEN — implement until Task 2 RED tests pass.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x plugins/dso/scripts/validate-gate-signal.py
- [ ] All RED tests now pass (GREEN)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && python -m pytest tests/scripts/test_validate_gate_signal.py -q
- [ ] Script validates a valid signal (exit 0)
  Verify: echo '{"gate_id":"1a","triggered":true,"signal_type":"primary","evidence":"found in git log","confidence":"high"}' | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/validate-gate-signal.py
- [ ] Script rejects invalid signal (non-zero exit)
  Verify: echo '{"gate_id":"1a"}' | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/validate-gate-signal.py 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] Script handles malformed JSON (non-zero exit)
  Verify: echo 'not json' | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/validate-gate-signal.py 2>/dev/null; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] ruff check passes on the new script
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/validate-gate-signal.py

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests GREEN (8/8 pass), ruff check clean ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — all 6 AC criteria pass, 8/8 tests GREEN, ruff clean
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
